svg.title: FinSecure Bank – AWS EKS Kubernetes Architecture
svg.desc: Structural diagram showing EKS cluster with control plane, node groups, namespaces, workloads, ingress, networking, and observability layers across multiple availability zones.

g.text: AWS Managed Control Plane (API Server · etcd · Scheduler · Controller Manager)
Cluster Autoscaler — scales node groups on pending pods / resource pressure

svg.text: Infrastructure provisioned via Terraform (EC2, EKS, IAM, Security Groups)
